ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager assigned to the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the project to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the project manager belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project manager was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project manager's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material or labor required */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., M3, M2) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of the material or labor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount for the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., repair, installation, maintenance) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the activity (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium, 3 for low) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Planned start date of the activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Planned end date of the activity */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the activity */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., M3, M2) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the material */,
  "stock_quantity" REAL /* Current stock quantity of the material */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Reorder level for the material to trigger a new order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the material was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the material's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_materials" (
  "activity_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-material link */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used in the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity-material link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity-material link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_materials_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor" (
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor type */,
  "labor_name" TEXT /* Name of the labor type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., hour, day) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of labor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the labor type */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the labor type belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the labor type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the labor type's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_labor" (
  "activity_labor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity-labor link */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the labor type */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of labor used in the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity-labor link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the activity-labor link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_labor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_labor_labor_id FOREIGN KEY ("labor_id") REFERENCES labor ("labor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_labor_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost estimate */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the estimate belongs to */,
  "estimate_date" TEXT /* Date the estimate was created */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total estimated cost for the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the estimate (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the cost estimate to track changes over time */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who prepared the estimate */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the estimate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the estimate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the estimate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimate_materials" (
  "estimate_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate-material link */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost estimate */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used in the estimate */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the material in the estimate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the estimate-material link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the estimate-material link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimate_materials_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES cost_estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimate_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimate_labor" (
  "estimate_labor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate-labor link */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost estimate */,
  "labor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the labor type */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of labor used in the estimate */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of labor in the estimate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the estimate-labor link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the estimate-labor link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_labor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimate_labor_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES cost_estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimate_labor_labor_id FOREIGN KEY ("labor_id") REFERENCES labor ("labor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_breakdown" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost breakdown */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the breakdown belongs to */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Total cost of materials for the activity */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Total cost of labor for the activity */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cost breakdown was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cost breakdown was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_breakdown_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, cost analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
